name: Horse Drill
description:
Practice Horse Charge attacks.
Build speed until flash appears,
then Charge into enemy Bow units.

name: Spear Drill
description:
Practice Spear Thrust and Counter.
When enemy Horse shows flash,
aim your spear tip to intercept.

name: Bow Drill
description:
Practice Bow attacks and Run Shot.
Learn arrow range and master
the timing of Run Shot.

name: Niu Jin Army
description:
Only Niu Jin is a named Lord.
His 'Reckless Rush' greatly
boosts POW but forces forward
movement only.

name: Lu Fan Army
description:
Features 2 units with Ambush.
Enemies touching Ambush units
take INT-based damage.

name: Gongsun Army
description:
Gongsun Zan's 'White Horse'
Skill increases the SPD of all
allies within range.

name: Wang Ping Army
description:
Shu Lords with 'Great Wheel'
and 'Speed Tactics' Skills.
Both enhance their unit type
strengths.

name: Zuo Ci Army
description:
All Lords have the Undying Trait.
They return to battle quickly
after death.

name: Shu Flowers
description:
All-female Lord deck.
Xiahou Yueji's 'Lightning' is
a damage Skill that scales
with INT difference.

name: Cao Brothers
description:
Cao Cao's sons in battle.
Cao Ang's 'Take My Horse!'
Buffs highest POW ally,
but Cao Ang dies.

name: Yu Jin Army
description:
All Lords have the Ambush Trait.
Each also has a Stealth Skill.

name: Jiang Qin Army
description:
Jiang Qin and Lu Fan both use
'Weaken Bow' - raises own POW
while arrows lower enemy POW.

name: Guo Jia Army
description:
Guo Jia's 'Flash Speed' costs
low MP to raise POW and SPD.
Short duration but deadly
with repeated Horse Charges.

name: Guan Yu Army
description:
Guan Yu's 'Long Spear' Skill
raises his POW and extends
his spear's reach.

name: Ding Feng Army
description:
Ding Feng's 'Paralyze Arrow'
raises POW and range. Arrows
also lower enemy SPD.

name: Cao Hong Army
description:
Cao Hong's 'Kamikaze' Skill
only allows forward movement,
but greatly raises POW and
Siege power.

name: Ma Liang Army
description:
Ma Liang's 'Line Revival'
revives 1 fallen unit at its
death location. Units dying
in enemy zone revive at Castle.

name: Doom Princess
description:
Yan's 'Ruin Dance' damages
both Castles periodically
while she dances.

name: Jian Yong Army
description:
Features the Ram unit type.
Rams move slowly but possess
overwhelming Siege power.

name: Lady Guo Army
description:
Built around Lords with
Debuff Skills that weaken
enemy forces.

name: Ji Ling Army
description:
Ji Ling's 'Mass Assault' raises
his POW. More allies on the
battlefield means greater boost.

name: Kan Ze Army
description:
Kan Ze's 'Risk Recommend'
raises INT of highest POW ally,
but Kan Ze dies in the process.

name: Xiahou Dun Army
description:
Led by Cao Cao's top general
Xiahou Dun. Yang Hu's 'Flash
Order' raises ally POW for low MP.

name: Garden Brothers
description:
Liu Bei's 'Peach Oath' greatly
raises all ally POW. But if any
affected Lord dies, all die.

name: Li Ru Army
description:
Li Ru's 'Assassin Toxin' drains
HP until you reach Castle.
Dong Bai blocks retreat. Deadly!

name: Sun Family
description:
Little Conqueror, Jiangdong
Tiger, wise mother, future king.
The famous Sun family of Wu.

name: Zhuge Liang
description:
Zhuge Liang's '8 Trigrams' has
multiple effects based on Lords
in range. Track and counter.

name: Yellow Turban
description:
Zhang Jiao's 'YT Rebellion'
revives all dead allies with
POW boost, but he dies.

name: Yi Ji Army
description:
Yi Ji and Wu Yi's 'Apt Support'
recovers HP of highest POW ally
within range.

name: Brave Ladies
description:
Female Lords from each faction.
Charm Trait increases your
starting MP.

name: Gan Ning Army
description:
Gan Ning's 'River Pirate' Skill
reduces POW damage taken by
allies in range.

name: Heal Princess
description:
While Lady Gan's 'Healing Dance'
is active, all ally Lords
gradually recover HP.

name: 3 Brave Lords
description:
Lords with Valor Trait from
three factions. Each uses
unique faction Skills.

name: Speed Cavalry
description:
Zhang Liao's 'Speed Order'
raises POW and boosts SPD
of Horse units.

name: Wheel Spears
description:
Fa Zheng's 'Wheel Command'
raises ally POW and Spears
attack in all directions.
Watch for 'Provoke' too.

name: Paralyze Bows
description:
Bow unit deck. Lu Meng's
'Paralyze Order' raises POW
and arrows lower enemy SPD.

name: Flash Speed
description:
Horse-only deck. Guo Jia's
'Flash Speed' raises POW and
boosts Horse SPD.

name: Lu Xun Army
description:
Lu Xun's 'Sun Tzu Order' is a
Focus Skill. Focus Skills
activate after charging and
cannot be denied.

name: Jiang Wei Army
description:
All Lords have the Regen Trait.
They recover HP while
stationary and out of melee.

name: Heaven Princess
description:
Cai Wenji's 'Heaven Dance'
boosts SPD of all allies
except herself while active.

name: Xiahou Dun Army
description:
Xiahou Dun's 'One Eye Roar'
stops enemies and raises POW
based on their count.
SPD up past threshold.

name: Fire Thunder
description:
Zhou Yu and others use 'Fire
Ploy'. Xu Shu uses 'Lightning'.
Damage scales with INT.

name: Chen Gong Army
description:
Chen Gong's 'Ruin Counsel'
greatly raises top POW ally's
POW but damages your Castle.

name: Bitter Lady
description:
Lady Zou's 'Bitter Dance'
raises ally POW each time
an ally dies while active.

name: Wei Yan Army
description:
Wei Yan's 'I Alone' kills
allies in range, raises POW
per death. SPD up past threshold.

name: Xun Yu Army
description:
Xun Yu, Liu Ye, Li Dian use
'Counter Ploy' and 'See Through'
to negate enemy Skills.

name: Sun Ce Army
description:
Zhou Yu's 'Chibi Inferno'
deals high INT-based damage.
Can activate from Ambush!

name: Outnumber Lady
description:
Lady Zhen's 'Outnumber Dance'
raises ally POW more when
outnumbered by enemies.

name: Sima Yi Army
description:
Led by Sima Yi. 'Fluid Tactics'
switches between Debuff and
Buff based on unit counts.

name: Huang Zhong
description:
Huang Zhong and Yan Yan's
Skills recover their HP.
Huang Zhong can exceed max HP.

name: Zhang Lu Army
description:
Zhang Lu's 'Five Pecks Way'
revives dead Rogue allies
at your Castle.

name: Field Princess
description:
Lady Mi's 'Field Dance' damages
the Castle of whoever loses
a unit while active.

name: Wei-Wu Alliance
description:
Rivals who respected each other:
Yang Hu and Lu Kang. Both
Skills raise ally POW.

name: Pang Tong Army
description:
Pang Tong's 'Chain Ploy+' lowers
enemy SPD. Huang Yueying's
'Yellow Accel' boosts SPD
for a Siege rush.

name: Meteor Princess
description:
Many Lords with Fence Trait.
Xiao Qiao's 'Meteor Ritual' is
a Focus Skill that damages
enemy Castle.

name: Jia Xu Army
description:
Jia Xu's 'Death Ploy' delays
enemy Revive. Hu Cheer's
'Death Tactics' has same effect.

name: Guan Yu Army
description:
Guan Yu's 'Loyal Order' raises
ally POW and recovers HP
beyond the maximum.

name: Old Veterans
description:
Veteran Lords from each faction.
Experienced warriors with
proven tactics.

name: Family Trouble
description:
Fathers and daughters. Dong
Zhuo's 'Tyrant's Path' raises
POW and SPD but damages Castle.

name: Fierce Lords
description:
Deck of self-Buff Lords.
High POW Lords boost their
own POW even higher.

name: Western Heroes
description:
Lords from the western frontier.
Powerful Skills worthy of
legendary horsemen.

name: Dragon-Phoenix
description:
Shu's two great Sages lead
this deck. Both wield
powerful Skills.

name: Sima Yi Couple
description:
Wei's henpecked Sima Yi and his
wife. 'Fluid Tactics' is tricky:
works as both Command and Debuff.

name: Jing Rush Army
description:
Bow and Spear units. Lu Meng's
'Paralyze Order' raises POW
and arrows slow enemies.

name: Siege Camp Army
description:
Gao Shun's 'Siege Camp' raises
POW and Siege power. POW boost
grows as your Castle HP drops.

name: Cao Clan Army
description:
Deck of the Cao clan.
Cao Cao's 'Lord's Appeal'
raises POW of all Wei Lords.

name: Wu Emperor
description:
Wu Emperor with his retainers.
Sun Quan's 'Young King Art'
raises POW of all Wu Lords.

name: Grand General
description:
Zhang Xun's 'Mass Produce'
revives all dead Rams with
SPD boost. Kill them, they
just keep coming back.

name: Unrivaled Army
description:
Led by the God of War, Lu Bu.
'Unrivaled' greatly raises POW,
recovers HP, boosts INT and SPD.

name: Sun Wu 3 Gens
description:
Sun Jian's 'Divine Vision'
greatly raises ally POW.
But affected units die when
the effect ends.

name: Ruinous Lady
description:
Diao Chan's 'Ruinous Dance'
periodically damages enemy
Castle while she dances.

name: 4 Fierce Lords
description:
Fierce Lords from each faction.
All have high POW and
powerful Skills.

name: Heal Princess+
description:
Lady Gan's 'Healing Dance'
recovers HP for all allies.
High total POW for aggression.

name: Wu Generals
description:
Lu Xun's 'Sun Tzu Order' raises
POW of all Wu allies.
It's a Focus Skill.

name: Five Tigers
description:
Face Shu's Five Tiger Generals.
All Lords excel in both
Skills and raw POW.

name: Wei Emperor
description:
Cao Pi's 'Wei War Order' raises
Wei Lords' POW for a long time.
One of the 'Hero Commands'.

name: Hero Couples
description:
Three Kingdoms hero couples.
Husbands use Commands,
wives use Dances.

name: Meteor Princess
description:
Da Qiao's 'Grand Meteor' deals
direct damage to enemy Castle.
Long Focus time but devastating.

name: Tiger-Demon
description:
Deck of high POW Lords. Xu Chu
and Dian Wei lead, but all
have low INT as a weakness.

name: Shu Emperor
description:
Deck of Shu elites. High in
both POW and INT, with
powerful Skills.
